title: 43 McCarthy Tétrault lawyers recognized for infrastructure expertise in Lexpert Special Edition: Infrastructure 2026
content:
## 43 McCarthy Tétrault lawyers recognized for infrastructure expertise in Lexpert Special Edition: Infrastructure 2026
Our infrastructure expertise has been recognized in Lexpert’s 2026 Special Edition: Infrastructure publication . Forty-three of the Firm’s lawyers were selected for their extensive expertise and innovative work at the intersection of infrastructure development, public-private partnerships, and complex regulatory and financing frameworks in Canada.
Those selected are top Lexpert -ranked lawyers and advisors with expertise in Infrastructure Law; Construction Law; and Transportation (Road & Rail), and with infrastructure-related expertise in Aboriginal Law; Banking & Financial Institutions; Corporate Commercial Law; Corporate Finance & Securities; Corporate Mid-Market; Energy (Electricity); Energy (Oil & Gas); Environmental Law; Litigation – Commercial Insurance; Litigation – Corporate Commercial; Project Finance; Real Estate – Commercial Leasing; and Real Estate – Property Development.
Lexpert’s 2026 Special Edition: Infrastructure showcases the high-impact mandates we deliver—and the end-to-end support we bring to infrastructure projects, from strategy to close.
We are proud to have our McCarthy Tétrault lawyers recognized:

## Lexpert Special Edition: Infrastructure
- Louis-Nicolas Boulanger
In addition, Brad Nicpon spoke to Lexpert about Canada’s rapidly evolving infrastructure market, which he described as entering a “golden era” of nation-building projects.

### Our Infrastructure Group
McCarthy Tétrault continues to execute on more infrastructure projects than any other law firm in Canada. Ranked among the world's best infrastructure practices, we adeptly execute on some of the largest and most significant projects in Canada and internationally. Our Firm provides clients with skilled, nationally integrated and multidisciplinary teams, experienced in project finance, procurement, zoning and planning, construction, Aboriginal, environmental, and other critical areas. Learn more about our infrastructure expertise.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
